SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.controller.menu

Class LevelGameOverController

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.menu.LevelGameOverController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class LevelGameOverController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
Controller for the Level Mode Game Over screen.

Manages the game over interface for Level Mode, displaying completion status, star ratings, best scores, and providing navigation options. Supports both successful level completion and failure scenarios with appropriate visual feedback and animations.

Key responsibilities:

  • Display level completion status and statistics
  • Show star ratings (0-3) based on performance
  • Display best score and time records
  • Provide navigation: retry, next level, back to selection, or main menu
  • Handle keyboard shortcuts for quick navigation

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • showGameOver

      public void showGameOver(int finalScore, int linesCleared, int targetLines, long playTimeMs, int stars, boolean success, int levelId, boolean isNewBestScore, boolean isNewBestTime)
      Displays the game over screen with game statistics and completion status. Updates all UI components, plays appropriate sound effects, and configures navigation options based on level completion status.
      Parameters:
      finalScore - the final score achieved in this attempt
      linesCleared - the number of lines cleared
      targetLines - the target number of lines required for completion
      playTimeMs - the time taken to complete or fail the level, in milliseconds
      stars - the number of stars earned (0-3) based on performance
      success - true if the level was completed successfully, false otherwise
      levelId - the unique identifier of the level
      isNewBestScore - true if this score is a new record for this level
      isNewBestTime - true if this completion time is a new record for this level

    • setOnTryAgain

      public void setOnTryAgain(Runnable callback)
      Sets the callback executed when the Try Again button is clicked.
      Parameters:
      callback - the runnable to execute, may be null
